$comment: Design token file for the Sub Account Switcher component
$description: Scrollable account-selection panel composed of a search input, a 'Current' account row, and grouped lists of recent and all sub-accounts separated by labeled section dividers. Width is 361px — standard mobile viewport minus horizontal padding. All row-level styling (input, list item, avatar, tag, radio, divider) belongs to their respective nested component token files.

width.description: Component width — standard mobile viewport (393px) minus 16px horizontal padding on each side

gap.description: Vertical gap between the search input field and the account list group below it

background.description: White background behind the stacked account rows and section dividers

gap.description: Vertical gap between each list item and each labeled section divider (Recent, All) within the group
